review:
This is the seed file. The Friday super-digest-friday scheduled task will overwrite this every Friday at 8:15 AM PT with the week's executive synthesis, KPI rollup, and combined feeds.

  • Until the first Friday run, the dashboard falls back to pulling JSON live from the Market Pulse and Regulatory Tracker GitHub Pages.
  • If the live fallback also hasn't been wired (those dashboards don't yet expose data/competitor_signals.json and data/regulatory_changes.json), see setup notes.
